name: TATHAN Casino
author: TathanDev
description:
# TATHAN Casino 🎰
You want some easy money ?! Or you just want to gamble public money ? Well enter the TATHAN Casino !

This mod add casino where you can gamble your money on casino game like the roulette or a slot machine.

## Games available
- Slot Machine 🎰
- Roulette 🛞
- Coin Flip 🪙
